services.subject: GEMS & GEMOLOGY CONSULTANT
services.detail: by experienced graduate gemologist (G.G.) instructor from GIA

lines: OVER 15 YEARS OF EXPERIENCES AS INSTRUCTORS AT GIA AND AIGS, WE WOULD LOVE TO SHARE OUR KNOWLEDGE AND ENSURE THE TRUST IN GEMS TO THE BUSINESS.
WE ARE WELCOME TO DO THE GEMOLOGICAL CONSULTANCY SERVICE BY THE EXPERT GEMOLOGISTS OF GCILAB.
Material Science (Gems and Jewelry), SWU
Graduate Gemologist (G.G.), GIA
Accredited Jewelry Professional (A.J.P.), GIA
Graduate Pearls Diploma, GIA
Manager of Gemology Education (School’s Principal), GIA Thailand Apr 2000—Jan 2011
Director of English Academic, AIGS Feb 2011—Apr 2012
Owner and Gemologist of Gemological Consultancy (GC Lab)
Over 10 years of teaching experiences for Graduate Gemologist Program (G.G.), GIA
Instructor for cooperate class Accredited Jewelry Professional(A.J.P.) with Christie’s,
Pearl Grading course in Singapore and Sri Lanka
Gemologist of GCI Lab (Gemological Consultancy)
Material Science (Gems and Jewelry), SWU
